title: Trinsmoton Rail Pack
description: The predecessor to Ultimate Briddle Rail Pack!
body:
# Trinsmoton Rail Pack
![Class 251 & 250](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8019891b0b0a1f0ce4d3b1ba7deb56ef8766e2b8.png)
This, being the predecessor of the Ultimate Briddle Rail Pack, contains a lot of old versions of trains that will be in the UBRP.
## Trains
- Class 250
- Class 251
- Class 420
- Class 190
- Class 191
- Class 210
- Class 211
- Class 418
- Class 600
- Class 605
- Class 606
- Class 607
- Class 80
